definition: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the time elapsing between the start of the input pulse (usually 10% of its maximum value) and the moment the corresponding output signal is at least 90% of its maximum value, of a bipolar transistor at reference conditions

definition_ml.en: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the time elapsing between the start of the input pulse (usually 10% of its maximum value) and the moment the corresponding output signal is at least 90% of its maximum value, of a bipolar transistor at reference conditions

remark: 1.   t_on} = t_d} + t_r}.|2.   The reference conditions at specifying times for bipolar transistors are normally:|- supply voltage|- collector current|- base current|- reference temperature
